data.title: Viral Red Cross x PEANUTS® T-shirts return for 75th anniversary celebration, fans excited.
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that the popular Red Cross x PEANUTS limited-edition T-shirts have made a return with a unique twist for Snoopy enthusiasts. In conjunction with the 75th anniversary of PEANUTS, the American Red Cross has teamed up with the franchise for a special celebration. This collaboration offers fans a renewed opportunity to purchase these coveted T-shirts, with the initiative likely to generate significant engagement considering the enduring popularity of both Snoopy and PEANUTS. The partnership is an exciting development for fans, who can now engage with this exclusive offering as part of the milestone celebration.

data.title: Creality launches K2 and K2 Pro 3D printers, expanding flagship lineup with advanced features.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on August 25, 2025, Creality, the top global 3D printer producer, unveiled the latest additions to its premier K series, the K2 and K2 Pro models. These new printers feature a robust metal construction and utilize an advanced step-servo mechanism. The K2 series enhancements highlight Creality's commitment to innovation and quality in the 3D printing industry.

data.title: QuickBooks introduces AI agents for financial forecasting by 2025, transforming business planning. Software Experts report.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in New York, Software Experts hailed QuickBooks for revolutionizing financial forecasting and planning in businesses. The incorporation of AI-powered agents in the platform marks a shift towards interconnected, automated processes. This recognition underscores QuickBooks' positive impact on streamlining financial operations and signals a changing landscape in business technology.

data.title: Author Kathleen Welton promotes self-love through children's books, including "Be WHOO You Are," inspiring kids.
data.description: Renowned author Kathleen Welton, known for her award-winning literary achievements and passion for nature, has expanded her line of children's books with the addition of another title in August 2025. The latest addition complements her existing collection, which includes popular works like "Choo! Choo! Choo! The Train at..." Welton's newest book aims to inspire children to soar to new heights by embracing confidence and self-love. Emphasizing these themes, the book is set to empower young readers and promote positive self-esteem.

data.title: Entrepreneur Tony Jeton Selimi shares 12-step methodology for success in London on Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Renowned author and transformational coach Tony Jeton Selimi has unveiled his new 12-step strategy for achieving mastery in mindset, influence, and leadership. The award-winning author and speaker recently introduced the methodology in London on August 25, 2025. Tony Jeton Selimi's latest book showcases his expertise in empowering individuals to enhance their mindset, influence others, and excel in leadership roles.

data.title: Pure Lithium wins 2025 Green Chemistry Challenge Award for Brine to Battery™, reducing energy consumption and carbon emissions.
data.description: A Chicago-based company, Pure Lithium, specializing in lithium metal battery technology, has received the prestigious 2025 Green Chemistry Challenge Award in Chemical and Process Design for Circularity. Their innovative Brine to Battery™ technology was recognized for its environmental benefits. The award was granted by the American Chemical Society, acknowledging Pure Lithium's efforts in reducing energy consumption and carbon emissions. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to sustainability and signifies their contribution to promoting green chemistry solutions.
Trump to sign executive order on Monday - Axios.
President Donald Trump Plans To Sign An Executive Order To End 'Cashless Bail' In Washington, D.C., According To Axios.

data.title: Bybit releases 1H 2025 report showing resilience during challenging period, the world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 25, 2025, Bybit, ranked as the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume globally, released its 1H 2025 Half-Year Report. The report showcases the company's ability to transform a difficult period in cryptocurrency history into a significant display of resilience and innovation.
Powell's Speech Sparks Strong Buying in Euro Options

data.title: Kaldalón hf. bought 950,000 shares in week 34 of 2025 for ISK 23,390,000 under buyback program.
data.description: During the 34th week of 2025, Kaldalón hf. acquired 950,000 of its own shares at a total cost of ISK 23,390,000.
Huhtamäki Oyj plans new notes, offers tender for 2026/2027 maturing notes. #finance #bondoffer
Bank of China Has Filed to List a 40 Billion US Dollar Medium Term Note Program

data.title: Crypto powerhouses Galaxy, Multicoin, and Jump aim to secure $1B for Solana fund, led by Cantor Fitzgerald.
data.description: Prominent crypto companies Galaxy, Multicoin, and Jump are in the process of gathering $1 billion for a Solana treasury, with Cantor Fitzgerald acting as the primary banker for the endeavor.

data.title: Hong Kong forms RWA Global Industry Alliance & Brand Committee with MINAX as core partner. Initiative aims to tokenize real-world assets, backed by major institutions.
data.description: The RWA Global Industry Alliance and its Brand Committee were inaugurated in Hong Kong during the MINAX Brand Listing Forum. Backed by key institutions, this program seeks to boost the tokenization of real-world assets (RWA) and create a full-fledged asset service structure to facilitate this process.

data.title: AUSTRAC imposes audit on Binance Australia due to AML concerns, giving 28 days to appoint external auditor for alleged control gaps.
data.description: Binance Australia has a deadline of 28 days to select an independent auditor in response to accusations of significant deficiencies in its anti-money laundering (AML) measures.

data.title: Pulnovo Medical appoints Dr. Francis Duhay as Global Chief Medical Officer. Leader in therapies for PH and HF.
data.description: Shanghai, August 25, 2025 - Pulnovo Medical, a prominent company specializing in mechanism-driven treatments for Pulmonary Hypertension (PH) and Heart Failure (HF), has appointed Dr. Francis Duhay, MD, MBA, FACS as the new Global Chief Medical Officer. Dr. Duhay, who is board-certified and brings expertise in the field, will play a key role in advancing the company's mission worldwide.
BlackRock Stops Raising Money for New Asia Private Credit Fund

data.title: Gold advocate Peter Schiff mocks CEO Michael Saylor's Bitcoin support, predicts MSTR demise. Bitcoin experienced a flash crash, with price dropping to $110,000 from over $114,000 due to a whale liquidating 24,000 BTC.
data.description: Renowned gold advocate and vocal Bitcoin critic, Peter Schiff, publicly ridiculed Michael Saylor, the CEO of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) on Monday, foreseeing the software company's downfall in reaction to Saylor's optimistic tweet about cryptocurrency. Saylor had commented that "bitcoin is on sale," to which Schiff sarcastically suggested waiting for the "Strategy going out of business sale" to acquire the digital asset. This altercation occurred amidst MSTR stock price fluctuations, with a recent flash crash in Bitcoin's value from over $114,000 to $110,000 due to a whale liquidating 24,000 BTC, causing over $562 million in market liquidations in just 12 hours. The rapid market volatility over the weekend heightened tensions, with Schiff criticizing Saylor for leveraging up in risky investment decisions. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: August 25, 2025: PDD Holdings expected to report earnings at $1.91/share on $14.35B revenue; NSSC expected at $0.27/share on $44.35M revenue.
data.description: Before the market opens, two companies are scheduled to report their quarterly earnings today. PDD Holdings, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PDD, is expected to announce earnings of $1.91 per share with a revenue of $14.35 billion. Another company, NAPCO Security Techs, also listed on NASDAQ under NSSC, is projected to report earnings of $0.27 per share on a revenue of $44.35 million. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
